title: Brenn (disambiguation)
content:
'''Brenn''' could refer to various subjects:
*'''[[Brenn]]''', the capital of [[Genesia]].
*'''[[Brenn Tantor]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] who defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*'''[[Sularus Brenn]]''', an Imperial [[Flight officer/Legends|flight officer]]
*Any of various topics containing the name '''[[Bren (disambiguation)|Bren]]'''.

{{Disambig}}
